scripts.postinstall: npm run build:eliza -w background-agents && cd packages/web && npx prisma generate
scripts.dev: set -a && source .env.local && set +a && next dev packages/web --port 4000
scripts.dev:electron: set -a && source .env.local && set +a && next dev packages/web --port 4000 & sleep 3 && npm run build -w @upstream/electron && BACKGROUND_AGENTS_URL=http://localhost:4000 electron packages/electron/dist/main.js
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd packages/web && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: cd packages/web && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:status: cd packages/web && npx prisma migrate status
scripts.build: npm run build -w background-agents && npm run build -w @upstream/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w background-agents && cd packages/web && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.start: set -a && source .env.local && set +a && next start packages/web --port 4000
